name: career email vague
input: help me write an email for an AE role

name: career email complete
input: Write an email to Ryan, Head of Enterprise Sales at Anthropic, about my interest in the open AE role. I have 6 years of enterprise sales experience and closed $40M in business. Use a personable professional tone and ask for a 15-minute call.

name: general email vague
input: write an email to my manager

name: ux design vague
input: help me design a web app

name: ux design complete
input: Design a web app dashboard for sales managers to forecast pipeline. Include deal review, rep coaching, and forecast history screens. Make it responsive and enterprise-ready. Return a screen-by-screen UX spec with states and interaction notes.

name: code build vague
input: build a mobile app

name: code build complete
input: Build a React Native mobile app for field sales reps using TypeScript. It should log visits, sync offline notes, and show account history. Include auth, local storage constraints, implementation steps, and code structure.

name: debug vague
input: fix this React bug

name: debug complete
input: Debug this React component. Current behavior: clicking Save shows a blank modal. Expected behavior: it should show a success message. Error logs show TypeError cannot read property id. Explain the root cause and provide a patch with tests.

name: data analysis vague
input: analyze this dataset

name: data analysis complete
input: Analyze this CSV dataset to understand why conversion dropped last quarter. Focus on revenue, funnel stage, region, and customer segment. Note missing data caveats and return insights with charts and recommendations.

name: data modeling vague
input: create a data model

name: data modeling complete
input: Design a data model for a subscription billing product. Include customers, subscriptions, invoices, payments, plans, and usage events. Show relationships, foreign keys, reporting constraints, and return SQL tables plus an ERD.

name: compare vague
input: compare HubSpot and Salesforce

name: compare complete
input: Compare HubSpot and Salesforce for a 40-person B2B sales team choosing a CRM. Criteria are cost, enterprise reporting, integrations, ease of admin, and scalability. Prioritize implementation risk and return a scorecard with recommendation.

name: plan vague
input: plan a product launch

name: plan complete
input: Create a launch plan for a B2B analytics product over 8 weeks. Account for a small marketing team, sales enablement dependencies, limited budget, milestones, checklist detail, and success metrics around pipeline and activation.

name: sql vague
input: write a SQL query

name: sql complete
input: Write a Postgres SQL query to calculate monthly active users from users and events tables. Join on user_id, filter to active status in the last 90 days, group by month, and explain the query.

name: product prd vague
input: create a PRD for a new feature

name: product prd complete
input: Create a PRD for a saved filters feature for sales managers. The problem is reps waste time rebuilding pipeline views. Include user stories, acceptance criteria, timeline constraints, analytics dependencies, and activation success metrics.

name: marketing copy vague
input: write landing page copy

name: marketing copy complete
input: Write landing page copy for RevOps leaders to book a demo. Position the product around faster pipeline inspection and cleaner forecasting. Use a confident enterprise voice and return three hero variants plus section copy.

name: legal policy vague
input: review this contract

name: legal policy complete
input: Review this enterprise SaaS contract for negotiation risk. Focus on liability, termination, data privacy, indemnity, and security clauses. Consider B2B vendor context and return a table of issues with suggested revisions.

name: finance vague
input: build a revenue forecast

name: finance complete
input: Build a revenue forecast for deciding next year's hiring plan. Use assumptions for growth, churn, CAC, conversion, margin, and runway. Evaluate base, upside, and downside scenarios and return a table with recommendation.

name: ops process vague
input: create an onboarding SOP

name: ops process complete
input: Create an onboarding SOP for new enterprise customers. Account for sales, support, CSM owners, SLA constraints, CRM tooling, handoff risks, escalation failure points, and return a checklist playbook.

name: hiring vague
input: make an interview scorecard

name: hiring complete
input: Create an interview scorecard for a senior product designer role. Evaluate UX craft, systems thinking, collaboration, and product judgment. Include criteria, questions, scoring rubric, and table format.

name: support vague
input: write a support reply

name: support complete
input: Write a customer support reply for an enterprise customer complaining about a refund issue. Reference our refund policy, use an empathetic but firm tone, explain the next step, and offer escalation if needed.

name: sales strategy vague
input: help with deal strategy

name: sales strategy complete
input: Create a sales strategy for Acme to advance a renewal deal. Use deal context from CRM, stakeholder pain, budget timing, competitor risk, procurement blocker, and return a talk track with discovery questions and next steps.

name: content vague
input: write a LinkedIn post

name: content complete
input: Write a LinkedIn post for founders about the topic of reducing AI token waste. Use a sharp educational voice, include a hook and key points, and return three variants under 120 words.

name: summarize vague
input: summarize this report

name: summarize complete
input: Summarize this report for executives. Focus on key points, risks, decisions, and action items. Keep it concise and return bullets plus a short memo summary.

name: explain vague
input: explain tokenization

name: explain complete
input: Explain tokenization to a nontechnical beginner. Give a brief overview, focus on how text becomes tokens, use a simple analogy and example, and return step-by-step bullets.
